title: Pokopia Cosmetic Forms [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Peakychu, Smearguru, and Mosslax, Professor Tangrowth, and Trainer Ditto to the game.
body:
Using Cobblemon 1.7's new cosmetic item feature, you can now give Pokemon items to give them cosmetics!
I implemented from Pokopia:
Peakychu, Mosslax, and Smearguru!

**NOTE: THIS IS A DATAPACK AND A RESOURCEPACK, PLEASE ADD TO DATAPACKS AND RESOURCEPACKS SECTIONS!**

- **Peakychu**
Give Pikachu **Soul Sand**
- **Mosslax**
Give Snorlax **Moss Block**
- **Smearguru**
Give Smeargle **Firework Rocket**
- **Professor Tangrowth** 
Give Tangrowth **Wise Glasses**
- **Ditto Trainer: Female**
Give Ditto **Yellow Pokedex**
- **Ditto Trainer: Male**
Give Ditto **Blue Pokedex**

You're welcome to add this addon to any modpack, please add me to the project if you do!

If you want to use this on a server and change the way these cosmetics are obtained in any way, please contact me to discuss options on Discord (BeezyMC)
